emails.subject: Re: deal 34342
emails.body: Daren Thu has asked if I can extend deal 343421 thru Feb. '01. I told her I didn't have the authority to do this. It is for Equistar. It looks like it is a term deal expiring Jan. '01. She wants it added to keep the ENA deal whole. What do you suggest? AL Forwarded by Aimee Lannou/HOU/ECT on 03/14/2001 10:58 AM

emails.subject: Re: deal 34342

emails.subject: Re: deal 34342
emails.body: We have a buyback under HPL (#586534). ENA had only 7,000/day scheduled at mtr 1373 in Feb. In reviewing the daily volumes in POPS, I didn't see any days with flow under 18,000. So, we should not need a buyback for ENA. Any shortages should be allocated to the HPL ticket. D Aimee Lannou 03/14/2001 11:03 AM
